hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ]; then content=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"content\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$content" | grep -qiE "(api[_-]?key|password|secret|token|bearer)\s*[=:]\s*[\x27\"][^\x27\"]{8,}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "BLOCKED: Potential secret detected in file write to $file" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",d.get(\"filePath\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.mdx ]]; then head -1 "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^---" || echo "WARNING: MDX file missing frontmatter: $file"; fi'
